title: betula pendula var. carelica
intro: Betula pendula var. carelica, also known as Carelian silver birch, is a variation of the silver birch tree (Betula pendula) native to the forests of European Russia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Betula pendula var. carelica include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
